inline_comments.message: I can't find a requirement R-70112.  What is that?

If this requirement is going to validate this many requirements, then it needs to output a more meaningful error message at the end.   Can we either split this or provide some assertion message to pinpoint what's wrong?

R-98407 states that teh requirement should not include _int, int_, _int_.   I don't see this being validated in this test case.  Should the requirement ID be removed or should the test case be updated?

R-90152 stats that a resources section must have at least 1 resource.  I don't see that being validated either.  I guess an exception might be raised on the call to keys(), but that's not going to yield a helpful message.
